title: Southern-Style Braised Collards
description: Savory, slow-cooked collard greens with a hint of smokiness. Serve as a side dish for a hearty meal.
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped collards, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Cover the pot and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the collards are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
